intent: 2BR / 2 baths distributed, QUADRANT split, LD style, no carport. 12x10 lot gives an 8x6 envelope = 48 m2 floor -- the clean 0-warning minimum for this topology (12x9 also solves but drops the preferred bath/kitchen sizes; 11x9 is infeasible). Private and public occupy diagonal corners: front band living (left) | dining (middle) | standard (right); rear band master+ensuite (left) | hall+T&B stacked (middle) | kitchen (right). Hall is the circulation hinge -- dining opens into it, master and T&B door into it, kitchen is open-plan to it. Living + dining are a real split (not a combined great room).
must_haves: one common bath (T&B) accessible from the hall
central hall hinge serving master, T&B, and the kitchen
separate living and dining rooms (side by side across the front)
